content:
🔥 GeoSentinel | HTML
🎯 Primary Use Case: Real-time global movement monitoring and geopolitical awareness for analysis and decision-making.
✨ Key Features: • Real-time ship and flight tracking • Aggregation of geodata • Geographic and geopolitical awareness • Analysis and visualization tools • Darkweb search via TOR
📖 Summary: GeoSentinel is a real-time geospatial monitoring platform that aggregates ship, flight, and geodata to provide global movement awareness. It offers tools for analysis, visualization, and decision-making, including advanced features like dark web searching and AI-powered assistance.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
